Tip of the Day
Skill levels exceeding a recipe's main skill requirement in the crafting interface provide additional Crafting outcome.

Glacier foraging

Glacier foraging
Main Skill: Foraging
Max Efficiency: 180%

You search far and wide through the empty glacier. You learn a lot about yourself, but is there anything here to find?

The Glacier foraging activity is a Foraging activity.

Location

This activity can be done at the following location:

  • Winter Waves Glacier in Jarvonia

Visibility

This activity is always visible.

Requirements

Skill Level Requirements:

  • At least Foraging lvl. 30.
  • At least Agility lvl. 30.

Experience Information

Skills Base
XP 		Base
Steps 		Base
XP/Step 		Total Base
XP/Step 		Minimum
Steps 		Max
XP/Step 		Total Max
XP/Step
Foraging 169 208 0.812 0.870 116 1.457 1.560
Agility 12 0.058 0.103

Drop Tables

Main Drops

Item Name Quantity Chance Odds Base
Rate 		W.E.A.R. Value
Single (Stack)
Nothing N/A 99.987% ~1 in 1 N/A N/A N/A
Blue ice sickle 1 0.013% ~1 in 7,692 1,600,000 steps 892,308 steps 120 (120)

Secondary Drops

Each of the secondary drops is rolled independently of the others.

Item Name Item Type Quantity Chance Odds Base
Rate 		W.E.A.R.
Agility chest Container 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 52,000 steps 29,000 steps
Foraging chest Container 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 52,000 steps 29,000 steps
Expedition journal Collectible 1 0.050% ~1 in 2,000 416,000 steps 232,000 steps
